chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1459 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.10.2025. Mr. Khalid Hussain Mallah, Advocate for Petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G Sindh. Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Additional P.G for the State a/w Inspector Muhammad Tahir Khanzada (SHO PS Husri). ***************************************** Petitioners are present along with their counsel. Petitioner No.1 once again has categorically made a statement before this Court that she being Sui- Juris has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 on her own freewill and choice without any pressure or coercion. She has further stated that neither she has been kidnapped nor abducted as alleged in the FIR bearing Crime No.260 of 2025 under Section 496-A, 324, 34-PPC of Police Station Husri, Hyderabad. Today I.O of the case is present in Court and has recorded the Statement under Section 161 Cr.P.C of Petitioner No.1 Mst. Noor Jahan wherein she has reiterated the facts as stated hereinabove. I.O states that he shall file report before the concerned Magistrate under Section 173 Cr.P.C. He shall do so within seven days from today. The concerned Magistrate shall pass orders in accordance with law on the report so submitted by the I.O. As far as the grievance of the private respondent, if any, is concerned, he is at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of his grievance, if so advised. In the meantime, legal protection shall be provided to the petitioners as and when required. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms.
In the meantime, legal protection shall be provided to the petitioners as and when required. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ali.
